title: chromolaena caldensis
intro: Chromolaena caldensis is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, belonging to the Asteraceae family, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Chromolaena caldensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe digestive issues. Chromolaena caldensis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
